calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Vacated

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication Of Issues is taken off calendar. The complaint was dismissed on February 26, 2015. Judge Harold Kahn; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Denise Doucette, CSR No. 5963; Dept. 302.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Further Responses To Judicial Council Interrogatories; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-09-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. STEPHEN J. GOROG, Tel No. (415) 986-1338 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. MARINA B. PITTS of Stubbs & Leone, P.C., Tel No. (925) 974-8600 appearing for the Defendant.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT'S Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Judicial Council Interrogatories is denied. Plaintiff's responses were code compliant. Defendant shall pay sanctions in the amount of $900.00 within 30 days of entry of this Order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2014 Set For Trial On Jun-29-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Compelling Further Responses To Judicial Council Interrogatories; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-16-2014 Continued To Jan-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances on Tuesday, December 16, 2014:
Stephen J. Gorog (415.986.1338), attorney for Plaintiff CHELSEA KHOO;
Marina B. Pitts of the Law Offices of Stubbs & Leone (925.974.8600), Attorney for Defendant
DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT.

Defendant's counsel will not stipulate to have this matter heard before the judge pro tem.
The matter is argued for the judge pro tem to prepare a report and recommendation. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO COMMUNITY COLLEGE DISTRICT'S Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Judicial Council Interrogatories; Request For Sanctions is continued to JAN-09-2015 at 9:30AM in Dept. 302. Judge Pro Tem: Noah D. Lebowitz; Clerk L. Fong; matter not reported. (302/JPT)
